# Templates

This directory is for reusable files that are not read directly by GitHub.

## Current Templates

| Template | Purpose |
| --- | --- |
| `README.template.md` | Starting point for repository, directory, or module README files. |
| `CODEOWNERS-soft.template` | Optional notification-only ownership template for repositories with supporting automation. |

## GitHub-Native Templates

GitHub issue templates live in `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/`.

The default pull request template lives at `.github/pull_request_template.md`.

## Rules

- Keep only copyable, generic templates here.
- Store GitHub-native files in the paths GitHub expects.
- Avoid hardcoded owners, local paths, product names, and repository-specific labels unless clearly marked as placeholders.
